purpose: Route document-oriented requests to the narrowest child across Word documents, PDFs, slide decks, and spreadsheets.
selection_order: Spreadsheet or workbook requests beat all other document work when the artifact is an Excel file, workbook model, formula workflow, or tabular spreadsheet deliverable.
Slide-deck requests beat word-processing and PDF work when the main artifact is a presentation, slide template, or multi-slide visual narrative.
Editable word-processing requests beat PDF when the request starts from a PDF but the real deliverable is a modifiable Word document with tracked changes, comments, or text flow editing.
Default to PDF only when the task is truly about fixed-layout PDF behavior such as forms, merge/split/encrypt, OCR, rendering, extraction, or final PDF output.

children.name: xlsx
children.summary: Handles Excel and workbook work such as formulas, tables, pivots, workbook automation, and spreadsheet deliverables.
route_when: The requested or implied output is an Excel workbook, spreadsheet model, worksheet update, pivot-table workflow, or formula-driven tabular deliverable.
The task is about workbook structure, formulas, recalculation, sheet-level analysis, or spreadsheet-specific formatting and automation.
avoid_when: The main artifact is a slide deck or presentation rather than a workbook.
The request is about fixed-layout PDF behavior or editable word-processing document revision rather than spreadsheet mechanics.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover document children automatically.

children.name: pptx
children.summary: Handles PowerPoint work such as creating decks, editing slide templates, extracting slide content, and visual QA for presentations.
route_when: The requested or implied output is a presentation, slide deck, pitch deck, template update, or multi-slide visual artifact.
The task is about slide layouts, slide XML editing, deck generation, or presentation QA rather than a workbook or word-processing document.
avoid_when: The main deliverable is an Excel workbook or spreadsheet model.
The main deliverable is an editable Word document or a PDF-specific form/extraction workflow.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover document children automatically.

children.name: docx
children.summary: Handles editable Word-document work such as document generation, XML-level edits, tracked changes, and PDF-to-Word conversion.
route_when: The requested or implied output is a Word document, editable report, redline-ready file, tracked-change workflow, or legacy `.doc` conversion target.
The task starts from a PDF but the real deliverable is an editable Word document rather than a fixed-layout PDF operation.
avoid_when: The request is primarily about filling forms, merging, splitting, encrypting, OCRing, extracting, or rendering PDFs while keeping the artifact as PDF.
The main deliverable is a slide deck or spreadsheet workbook rather than a word-processing document.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover document children automatically.

children.name: pdf
children.summary: Handles fixed-layout PDF work such as form filling, extraction, OCR, merge/split/encrypt operations, rendering, and final PDF output.
route_when: The task is about PDF-specific operations such as form filling, merge/split/rotate/encrypt, OCR, text or table extraction, page rendering, or final fixed-layout PDF delivery.
The artifact should remain a PDF rather than becoming a modifiable Word document, workbook, or slide deck.
avoid_when: The real deliverable is an editable Word document produced from a PDF source.
The main deliverable is a spreadsheet workbook or slide deck rather than a PDF.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover document children automatically.
